missionEventData.data1: The Empire was not slow to crack down on Sullust. Their chief political official has been arrested and is now being transported by heavily guarded convoy to the Invincible. This is a great blow to our hope of securing Sullustan support. But swift action now may yet swing them for the Alliance. Y-Wings from Red Squadron will jump in to disable the prisoner transport before running cover for our rescue transport. Don’t engage the Invincible! We want to be in and out as quickly as possible.
Red Squadron head to the jump point immediately.
Cut the chatter Red 2. Switch to ion cannons and disable those Sentinels. I'll take the Lambda.
Target ship disabled. Activating beacon for boarding craft.
Hostage secured. Commence release from docking.
The Invincible is launching more fighters!
Thanks for the cover Red Squadron. We'll see you back at the fleet.
Okay Red Squadron. Make a break for the jump point.
This is Dagger One, the target is marked and we're beginning our approach.
We need to destroy those Fighters before we can make the jump to Hyperspace.
Okay Red Squadron move to engage those Ties
Looks like they're getting set up for an orbital bombardement.

With the liberation of their leader, the Sullustan people have thrown their support behind the Rebel Alliance, bringing much needed ships and supplies to our cause. But their greatest gift is something unexpected…
